title: What's one thing you wish AI did well?
abstract: It's your turn! Imagine you could ask AI to do one thing better. What would it be? Let's unleash our creativity together with "Ask HN." Share your idea and make your voice heard. Why wait for someone else to speak up? Tell us what you wish AI did well!
abstract_zh: 这回轮到你了！想象一下，如果你能给AI提一个要求，你会说啥？来吧，畅所欲言，让我们一起开脑洞～“问HN”工具帮你把想法变成声音。
